{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Well Engineer",
  "description": "Benel Energy Resources Limited founded in August 2009, is a knowledge-driven organization that provides technical and innovative solutions to the oil and gas industry. As a technical services company with a team of certified professionals, we are Well Engineers, Petroleum Engineers, Asset Managers, Project Managers, Operations Managers and certified industry Training Instructors.

We provide technical consulting, capacity development, and project management services in field development planning with expertise from reservoir modelling (identification, evaluation, and optimization) project execution (well construction, intervention &amp; facilities) to asset management (production enhancement &amp; operations management) in the industry. Using leading-edge software packages, we provide optimum solutions for our clients to enhance the viability of their projects and improve the assurance of successful delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Well Engineer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Description


	This is an on-site, full-time role based in Nigeria for a Well Engineer.
	The Well Engineer will be responsible for designing wells, preparing drilling programs, overseeing well construction activities, and ensuring compliance with safety and technical standards.
	Day-to-day tasks include conducting technical studies, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams, providing on-site support during drilling operations, and optimizing well performance.
	The role also involves regularly reviewing processes to improve efficiency and minimize environmental impact.


Qualifications


	8-10 Years of Experience in Well Design, Drilling Operations, and Well Construction
	Competence in Technical Assurance and Compliance with Safety Standards
	Proficiency in using Software Tools for Well Simulation and Analysis
	Strong Problem-Solving, Communication, and Project Management Skills
	Understanding of Oil and Gas Industry Standards and Environmental Regulations
	Bachelor&#39;s degree in Petroleum Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or related field is required
	Relevant certifications in drilling or well engineering would be an advantage


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@benelenergy.com and tadeosun@benelenergy.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-13",

Well Engineer Job at Benel Energy Resources Limited




        
    

        
        Benel Energy Resources Limited founded in August 2009, is a knowledge-driven organization that provides technical and innovative solutions to the oil and gas industry. As a technical services company with a team of certified professionals, we are Well Engineers, Petroleum Engineers, Asset Managers, Project Managers, Operations Managers and certified industry Training Instructors.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We provide technical consulting, capacity development, and project management services in field development planning with expertise from reservoir modelling (identification, evaluation, and optimization) project execution (well construction, intervention & facilities) to asset management (production enhancement & operations management) in the industry. Using leading-edge software packages, we provide optimum solutions for our clients to enhance the viability of their projects and improve the assurance of successful delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Well Engineer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Description


	This is an on-site, full-time role based in Nigeria for a Well Engineer.
	The Well Engineer will be responsible for designing wells, preparing drilling programs, overseeing well construction activities, and ensuring compliance with safety and technical standards.
	Day-to-day tasks include conducting technical studies, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams, providing on-site support during drilling operations, and optimizing well performance.
	The role also involves regularly reviewing processes to improve efficiency and minimize environmental impact.


Qualifications


	8-10 Years of Experience in Well Design, Drilling Operations, and Well Construction
	Competence in Technical Assurance and Compliance with Safety Standards
	Proficiency in using Software Tools for Well Simulation and Analysis
	Strong Problem-Solving, Communication, and Project Management Skills
	Understanding of Oil and Gas Industry Standards and Environmental Regulations
	Bachelor's degree in Petroleum Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or related field is required
	Relevant certifications in drilling or well engineering would be an advantage


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] and [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Engineering Supervisor",
  "description": "Unilever Nigeria Plc - Welcome to Unilever, a global multinational and fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) company with products sold in over 190 countries and more than 2 billion consumers across the world who use our amazing products everyday!

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Engineering Supervisor

Job ID: R-1174320
Job Location: Oregun, Ikeja - Lagos
Function: Supply Chain
Reports to: Factory Engineer
Scope: Local
Terms &amp; Conditions: Full time, office based

What Will Your Main Responsibilities Be
Team Leadership:


	Supervise, mentor, and evaluate engineers and technicians.
	Assign tasks, monitor progress, and ensure timely completion of projects within the utility space.
	Foster a culture of collaboration, innovation, and accountability.


Project &amp; Operations Management:


	Plan, coordinate, and oversee engineering projects from design to execution.
	Ensure adherence to project timelines, budgets, and quality standards.
	Review technical drawings, specifications, and reports.


Technical Oversight:


	Provide guidance on engineering methods, tools, and best practices.
	Troubleshoot technical issues and implement effective solutions.
	Ensure compliance with industry codes, standards, and regulations.
	Shadow as line focus engineering to deliver optimal efficiency across packing and process line.
	Ability to lead a detail RCA, EWO to crash BD, MTTR, MTBF


Safety &amp; Compliance:


	Enforce workplace safety policies and procedures.
	Conduct risk assessments and implement corrective actions.
	Ensure compliance with environmental and regulatory requirements.


Continuous Improvement:


	Identify opportunities to optimize processes and reduce costs.
	Implement lean manufacturing, Six Sigma, or other efficiency initiatives.
	Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends.


Requirements
Experiences &amp; Qualifications


	HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Engineering (Mechanical, Electrical, or Mechatronics).
	5&ndash;8 years of engineering experience, with at least 2 years in a supervisory role.
	Strong knowledge of engineering principles, project management, and safety standards.
	Proficiency in CAD software, project management tools, and MS Office.
	Strong knowledge of utility systems (power distribution, HVAC, boilers, chillers, water treatment, etc.).
	Proficiency in engineering software and MS Office tools.
	Familiarity with safety, environmental, and regulatory standards.
	Excellent leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills.


Skills:


	Leadership &amp; People Management
	Technical Expertise &amp; Analytical Thinking
	Project Planning &amp; Execution
	Safety &amp; Quality Orientation
	Decision-Making &amp; Problem-Solving
	Communication &amp; Collaboration


Leadership:


	You are energized by delivering fantastic results. You are an example to others &ndash; both your results and your resilience. You are constantly on the lookout for better ways to do things, engaging and collaborating with others along the way.
	As an individual you are the one responsible for your own wellbeing and delivering high standards of work. You must also focus on the Consumer and what they need. You are humble and have your head up, looking around to interpret evidence and data smartly, spot issues and opportunities to make things better.


Critical SOL (Standards of Leadership) Behaviors:


	Passion for High Performance: Takes personal responsibility and accountability for execution and results. Has an owner&rsquo;s mindset, using data and insight to make decisions.
	Personal Mastery: Sets high standards for themselves. Actively builds own wellbeing and resilience.
	Consumer Love: Whatever their role, always looks for better ways to serve consumers. Invests time inside and outside to understand the needs of consumers.
	Purpose &amp; Service: Has humility, understanding that leadership is service to others, inside and outside Unilever.
	Agility: Explores the world around them, continually learning and developing their skills.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-12",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-19",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Unilever Nigeria Plc"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "198755"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Engineering Supervisor Job at Unilever Nigeria Plc




        
    

        
        Unilever Nigeria Plc - Welcome to Unilever, a global multinational and fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) company with products sold in over 190 countries and more than 2 billion consumers across the world who use our amazing products everyday!

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Engineering Supervisor

Job ID: R-1174320
Job Location: Oregun, Ikeja - Lagos
Function: Supply Chain
Reports to: Factory Engineer
Scope: Local
Terms & Conditions: Full time, office based

What Will Your Main Responsibilities Be
Team Leadership:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Supervise, mentor, and evaluate engineers and technicians.
	Assign tasks, monitor progress, and ensure timely completion of projects within the utility space.
	Foster a culture of collaboration, innovation, and accountability.


Project & Operations Management:


	Plan, coordinate, and oversee engineering projects from design to execution.
	Ensure adherence to project timelines, budgets, and quality standards.
	Review technical drawings, specifications, and reports.


Technical Oversight:


	Provide guidance on engineering methods, tools, and best practices.
	Troubleshoot technical issues and implement effective solutions.
	Ensure compliance with industry codes, standards, and regulations.
	Shadow as line focus engineering to deliver optimal efficiency across packing and process line.
	Ability to lead a detail RCA, EWO to crash BD, MTTR, MTBF


Safety & Compliance:


	Enforce workplace safety policies and procedures.
	Conduct risk assessments and implement corrective actions.
	Ensure compliance with environmental and regulatory requirements.


Continuous Improvement:


	Identify opportunities to optimize processes and reduce costs.
	Implement lean manufacturing, Six Sigma, or other efficiency initiatives.
	Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends.


Requirements
Experiences & Qualifications


	HND / Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering (Mechanical, Electrical, or Mechatronics).
	5–8 years of engineering experience, with at least 2 years in a supervisory role.
	Strong knowledge of engineering principles, project management, and safety standards.
	Proficiency in CAD software, project management tools, and MS Office.
	Strong knowledge of utility systems (power distribution, HVAC, boilers, chillers, water treatment, etc.).
	Proficiency in engineering software and MS Office tools.
	Familiarity with safety, environmental, and regulatory standards.
	Excellent leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills.


Skills:


	Leadership & People Management
	Technical Expertise & Analytical Thinking
	Project Planning & Execution
	Safety & Quality Orientation
	Decision-Making & Problem-Solving
	Communication & Collaboration


Leadership:


	You are energized by delivering fantastic results. You are an example to others – both your results and your resilience. You are constantly on the lookout for better ways to do things, engaging and collaborating with others along the way.
	As an individual you are the one responsible for your own wellbeing and delivering high standards of work. You must also focus on the Consumer and what they need. You are humble and have your head up, looking around to interpret evidence and data smartly, spot issues and opportunities to make things better.


Critical SOL (Standards of Leadership) Behaviors:


	Passion for High Performance: Takes personal responsibility and accountability for execution and results. Has an owner’s mindset, using data and insight to make decisions.
	Personal Mastery: Sets high standards for themselves. Actively builds own wellbeing and resilience.
	Consumer Love: Whatever their role, always looks for better ways to serve consumers. Invests time inside and outside to understand the needs of consumers.
	Purpose & Service: Has humility, understanding that leadership is service to others, inside and outside Unilever.
	Agility: Explores the world around them, continually learning and developing their skills.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Procurement Officer Job at Paga Limited

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "Paga is a licensed financial services company and a leading payments company in Nigeria with a massive transformative purpose - to make it simple for one billion people to access and use money. It was founded on the simple belief that the ubiquity of mobile phones can be leveraged in building an ecosystem that enables people to digitally send and receive money and creating simple financial access for everyone.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer&nbsp;
Job Location: Lagos
Report to: Financial Controller

Job Summary&nbsp;


	Paga is looking for a passionate and self-driven procurement officer to join our growing team!
	The Procurement Officer is responsible for managing the organization&rsquo;s end-to-end procurement process from sourcing and vendor selection to purchase order (PO) management, contract negotiation, and ensuring timely delivery of goods and services.
	The role ensures that all procurement activities align with company policies, deliver value for money, and support operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities
Procurement Planning &amp; Strategy:


	Develop and implement procurement plans in line with business objectives and budget.
	Support departments in identifying procurement needs and preparing specifications or terms of reference.
	Maintain the procurement calendar and ensure timely processing of requisitions.


Vendor Management:


	Identify, evaluate, and onboard suppliers based on price, quality, reliability, and service delivery.
	Maintain an up-to-date and approved vendor database in the ERP (e.g., NetSuite).
	Conduct periodic vendor performance reviews and ensure compliance with contracts and SLAs.


Purchase Order Management:


	Review and process purchase requisitions, ensuring accuracy and completeness.
	Raise and track Purchase Orders (POs) in NetSuite, ensuring timely approvals and proper documentation.
	Monitor open POs and follow up on pending deliveries or invoices.


Sourcing and Negotiation:


	Obtain and evaluate quotes or bids from multiple suppliers to ensure competitive pricing.
	Negotiate favorable terms, discounts, and credit arrangements where applicable.
	Ensure all procurement activities comply with company policy and regulatory requirements.


Reporting &amp; Documentation:


	Maintain accurate procurement records, including contracts, POs, vendor correspondence, and invoices.
	Prepare periodic procurement reports (e.g., PO status, spend analysis, savings achieved).
	Support internal and external audits with relevant procurement documentation.


Policy Compliance &amp; Process Improvement:


	Enforce procurement policies, approval limits, and ethical standards.
	Recommend process improvements to enhance efficiency and transparency.
	Ensure segregation of duties and adherence to internal controls.
	Lead the implementation and optimization of ERP systems (NetSuite), accounting tools, and automation of reporting workflows.
	Standardize processes for financial operations, reconciliations, and reporting across all subsidiaries.


Education &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Supply chain management, Business administration, Accounting, Finance, Economics or related field.
	Any Supply Chain Certification is a plus.
	Must have completed the mandatory NYSC


Experience:


	3- 5 years of progressive experience in procurement preferably within a corporate or ERP driven environment.
	Strong negotiation, analytical, and vendor management skills.
	Experience using ERP systems (e.g., NetSuite, SAP, Oracle) for procurement processes.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-12",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-13",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Paga Limited"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

    "@type": "PropertyValue",

    "value": "198754"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Procurement Officer Job at Paga Limited




        
    

        
        Paga is a licensed financial services company and a leading payments company in Nigeria with a massive transformative purpose - to make it simple for one billion people to access and use money. It was founded on the simple belief that the ubiquity of mobile phones can be leveraged in building an ecosystem that enables people to digitally send and receive money and creating simple financial access for everyone.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer 
Job Location: Lagos
Report to: Financial Controller

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Paga is looking for a passionate and self-driven procurement officer to join our growing team!
	The Procurement Officer is responsible for managing the organization’s end-to-end procurement process from sourcing and vendor selection to purchase order (PO) management, contract negotiation, and ensuring timely delivery of goods and services.
	The role ensures that all procurement activities align with company policies, deliver value for money, and support operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities
Procurement Planning & Strategy:


	Develop and implement procurement plans in line with business objectives and budget.
	Support departments in identifying procurement needs and preparing specifications or terms of reference.
	Maintain the procurement calendar and ensure timely processing of requisitions.


Vendor Management:


	Identify, evaluate, and onboard suppliers based on price, quality, reliability, and service delivery.
	Maintain an up-to-date and approved vendor database in the ERP (e.g., NetSuite).
	Conduct periodic vendor performance reviews and ensure compliance with contracts and SLAs.


Purchase Order Management:


	Review and process purchase requisitions, ensuring accuracy and completeness.
	Raise and track Purchase Orders (POs) in NetSuite, ensuring timely approvals and proper documentation.
	Monitor open POs and follow up on pending deliveries or invoices.


Sourcing and Negotiation:


	Obtain and evaluate quotes or bids from multiple suppliers to ensure competitive pricing.
	Negotiate favorable terms, discounts, and credit arrangements where applicable.
	Ensure all procurement activities comply with company policy and regulatory requirements.


Reporting & Documentation:


	Maintain accurate procurement records, including contracts, POs, vendor correspondence, and invoices.
	Prepare periodic procurement reports (e.g., PO status, spend analysis, savings achieved).
	Support internal and external audits with relevant procurement documentation.


Policy Compliance & Process Improvement:


	Enforce procurement policies, approval limits, and ethical standards.
	Recommend process improvements to enhance efficiency and transparency.
	Ensure segregation of duties and adherence to internal controls.
	Lead the implementation and optimization of ERP systems (NetSuite), accounting tools, and automation of reporting workflows.
	Standardize processes for financial operations, reconciliations, and reporting across all subsidiaries.


Education & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Supply chain management, Business administration, Accounting, Finance, Economics or related field.
	Any Supply Chain Certification is a plus.
	Must have completed the mandatory NYSC


Experience:


	3- 5 years of progressive experience in procurement preferably within a corporate or ERP driven environment.
	Strong negotiation, analytical, and vendor management skills.
	Experience using ERP systems (e.g., NetSuite, SAP, Oracle) for procurement processes.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

	We are seeking a highly experienced and certified Dermatologist to join our team.


Requirements


	Relevant medical qualifications and certifications
	Strong experience in dermatology, skin treatment, and patient care
	Excellent communication and professional skills.


Salary
N1,000,000 - N2,500,000 monthly depending on experience and expertise.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: iadegoke@craneburgrealty.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For Further Enquiries text 09064133856 via Whatsapp.",

Dermatologist Job at Locodove Ventures Limited




        
    

        
        Locodove Ventures Limited - We are a Lagos-based construction company involved in building projects, infrastructure, and related services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Dermatologist
Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a highly experienced and certified Dermatologist to join our team.


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Relevant medical qualifications and certifications
	Strong experience in dermatology, skin treatment, and patient care
	Excellent communication and professional skills.


Salary
N1,000,000 - N2,500,000 monthly depending on experience and expertise.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For Further Enquiries text 09064133856 via Whatsapp.

Head of Marketing Job at Compovine Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Compovine Technologies Limited is an indigenous company with the main aim of offering Information Technology, Sales and Services to individuals and corporate organizations. Compovine Technology Limited currently has branches in Ibadan, Abuja, Lagos, Lokoja, Kano, Kaduna, Jos, Minna, Port Harcourt and Enugu, and we are still expanding.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Marketing

Job Locations: Ikeja - Lagos, Ibadan - Oyo, and Enugu

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Developing strategic marketing campaigns to help achieve business results
	Ensuring that plans and messaging are aligned with business strategy, reinforce brand positioning and are delivered effectively to targeted audiences
	Designing and delivering scalable marketing programs and campaigns that provide value added content that is suited to clients’ and prospects’ needs as well as interests
	Supporting integrated marketing and communications across a variety of channels and vehicles– internal, external, PR, digital, social, web, etc.
	Acting as a brand champion both internally and externally and ensuring full compliance with the brand guidelines and messaging across all solutions
	Collaborating across teams to develop key messages for campaigns, programs and content syndication including thought leadership, market reports, surveys, and client success stories.
	Collaborating with different stakeholders to ensure successful implementation of strategic marketing plans including defining success criteria, measuring effectiveness of initiatives, and reporting on results
	Ensuring that marketing and communications efforts adhere to agreed timelines and managing expectations with various stakeholders
	Keeping up to date with market developments and competitor strategies


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 5 years of experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
